zh.lifeSummary: Alan de Dunstanville II於大約1145年出生在英國維爾爾卡素 可姆。他和Muriel Langetot至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1200年10月10日之前，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利福可斯波利 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Alan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

en.lifeSummary: Alan de Dunstanville II was born about 1145, in Castle Combe, Wiltshire, England. He had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Muriel Langetot. He died before 10 October 1200, and was buried in Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Alan de Dunstanville IIは約1145年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアカストル コンベで生まれた。彼はMuriel Langetotとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1200年10月10日以前に死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアテウケスブリーテウケスブリー アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucester: 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 튜케스버이 튜케스버이 애브브이
ko.lifeSummary: Alan de Dunstanville II(은)는 대략 1145년 영국 윌츠히르 카스틀 코브에서 태어났다. 그는 Muriel Langetot(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1200년 10월 10일 이전 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 튜케스버이 튜케스버이 애브브이에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Alan de Dunstanville II родился около 1145 г. в местности кастл комб, уилцхир, Англия. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Muriel Langetot. Он умер перед 10 октябрь 1200 г. и был похоронен в местности тюкесбури эбби, тюкесбури, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.
